attr.title: Flash Launcher
attr.desc: A Flash/SWF game player for handheld Linux devices. Based on FlashLauncherZJ by StarCatL, using Adobe AIR runtime with a Love2D game selection menu. Plays classic Flash games (SWF files) natively on ARM handhelds via PortMaster.
attr.inst: Place .swf game files in ports/flashlauncher/programs/ (each in its own subfolder). Launch from Ports menu, select a game, and play.
